title: Cronos Group (CRON) Stock Price & Overview
text: Cronos Group (CRON) stock overview and historical data. StockAnalysis provides comprehensive information on Cronos Group including price history, analyst ratings, earnings history, and financial metrics. The company operates in cannabis cultivation and sales across Canada, Israel, and selected international markets. Market cap and stock valuation metrics are tracked. Historical earnings results are compared against analyst estimates. Revenue growth trends show consistent year-over-year improvements in recent quarters. The company's path to profitability has improved significantly with positive free cash flow generation in 2024.
